questions.question: Name the four main characters on The Andy Griffith Show.
questions.answer: Andy Taylor, Barney Fife, Opie, Aunt Bee

questions.question: What famous E.B. White children's novel, set in a barn, was published in 1952?
'How many roads must a man walk down/Before you call him a man?' Name that song.
What cult leader was ultimately responsible for his communal family committing nine murders in 1969?
Finish the famous phrase from The Pride of the Yankees: 'Today, I consider myself ___.'
questions.answer: "the luckiest man on the face of the earth."
